name: synced_cam
description: Synthetic camera that emits 320x240 grayscale frames; two instances generate matching TIDs from a shared wall-clock epoch so the trigger bus pairs them.

params.name: period_ms
params.doc: Cycle period in ms; both instances must use the same value.

params.name: auto_start
params.doc: Whether the worker thread starts emitting immediately.

outputs.name: frame
outputs.doc: 320x240 grayscale frame; first 4 bytes embed seq number (LE u32).
